name: Evolution Power
description: Can be applied only to monsters with Leader legacy type, allowing them to evolve into a Leader form.

zh.name: 进化之力
zh.description: 对首领血脉的精灵使用，可以使该精灵在本场战斗中进化，部分精灵会激活远古血脉。

name: Sun Healing
description: Can be applied to Grass (or Grass legacy type) monsters. Restores 50% max HP.

zh.name: 光合治愈
zh.description: 对草系或者草血脉的精灵使用，恢复精灵50%生命。

name: Flare Burst
description: Can be applied to Fire (or Fire legacy type) monsters. Move power +150% this turn.

zh.name: 闪焰爆发
zh.description: 对火系或者火血脉的精灵使用，本回合技能威力提升150%。

name: Flow Spell
description: Can be applied to Water (or Water legacy type) monsters. Moves do not consume energy this turn.

zh.name: 节流术
zh.description: 对水系或者水血脉的精灵使用，本回合技能不扣除能耗。

name: Willpower Enhancement
description: Can be applied to any monster except those with Leader legacy type. Replaces the first move in monster's move list with the 'Willpower Impact' move for 1 turn. The move has type the same as the monster's legacy type. Cooldown is 3 turns. Can be used up to 2 times per battle.

zh.name: 愿力强化
zh.description: 对任意血脉的精灵使用（首领血脉除外），使用后技能栏第一个技能本回合被替换为【愿力冲击】技能，技能属性与当前精灵的血脉一致。效果持续1回合，冷却时间3回合，每场战斗最多使用2次。
